meanings.example: The new policy will bring about significant changes.
meanings.example_zh: 新政策将带来重大变化。

meanings.example: The ground was covered with snow.
meanings.example_zh: 地面被雪覆盖。

meanings.example: She is happy with her new job.
meanings.example_zh: 她对她的新工作很满意。

meanings.example: He solved the problem with ease.
meanings.example_zh: 他轻而易举地解决了问题。

meanings.example: Many countries participate in the Olympics.
meanings.example_zh: 许多国家参加奥林匹克运动会。

meanings.example: He decided to drop out of school.
meanings.example_zh: 他决定辍学。

meanings.example: I look up to my teacher for her knowledge and kindness.
meanings.example_zh: 我钦佩我的老师，因为她知识渊博且善良。

meanings.example: Her dream of becoming a doctor came true.
meanings.example_zh: 她成为一名医生的梦想实现了。

meanings.example: He left behind a legacy of kindness.
meanings.example_zh: 他留下了一笔善良的遗产。

meanings.example: The memory of her will live on forever.
meanings.example_zh: 她的记忆将永远存在。

meanings.example: Above all, we must be safe.
meanings.example_zh: 最重要的是，我们必须安全。

meanings.example: Michael Faraday was a famous scientist.
meanings.example_zh: 迈克尔·法拉第是一位著名的科学家。

meanings.example: Marie Curie won the Nobel Prize.
meanings.example_zh: 玛丽·居里获得了诺贝尔奖。

meanings.example: She won the Nobel Prize for her research.
meanings.example_zh: 她因她的研究获得了诺贝尔奖。

meanings.example: Isaac Newton discovered the laws of gravity.
meanings.example_zh: 艾萨克·牛顿发现了万有引力定律。

meanings.example: Isambard Brunel was a great engineer.
meanings.example_zh: 伊桑巴德·布鲁内尔是一位伟大的工程师。

meanings.example: Alan Turing was a pioneer in computer science.
meanings.example_zh: 阿兰·图灵是计算机科学的先驱。

meanings.example: I.M. Pei designed many famous buildings.
meanings.example_zh: 贝聿铭设计了许多著名的建筑。

meanings.example: The Louvre Museum is in Paris.
meanings.example_zh: 卢浮宫博物馆在巴黎。

meanings.example: Victor Hugo wrote many famous novels.
meanings.example_zh: 维克多·雨果写了许多著名的小说。

meanings.example: The Western Regions were important in ancient trade.
meanings.example_zh: 西域在古代贸易中非常重要。

meanings.example: The Silk Road connected China with the West.
meanings.example_zh: 丝绸之路连接了中国和西方。

meanings.example: The event occurred in the Common Era.
meanings.example_zh: 该事件发生在公元。

meanings.example: The Warring States Period was a time of great turmoil.
meanings.example_zh: 战国时期是一个动荡不安的时期。

meanings.example: She looked up the word in the dictionary.
meanings.example_zh: 她在字典中查阅了这个词。

meanings.example: In general, the students did well.
meanings.example_zh: 总的来说，学生们表现得很好。

meanings.example: I came across an old friend.
meanings.example_zh: 我偶然遇见了一位老朋友。

meanings.example: She learned the language step by step.
meanings.example_zh: 她逐步地学习了这门语言。

meanings.example: We need to build up our team's strength.
meanings.example_zh: 我们需要增强我们团队的实力。

meanings.example: We decided to put off the meeting until next week.
meanings.example_zh: 我们决定把会议推迟到下周。

meanings.example: The project was successful in part due to teamwork.
meanings.example_zh: 这个项目在某种程度上是由于团队合作而成功的。

meanings.example: In addition to studying, I also play sports.
meanings.example_zh: 除了学习，我还做运动。

meanings.example: You should take advantage of every opportunity.
meanings.example_zh: 你应该利用每一个机会。

meanings.example: The door opened up to reveal a beautiful garden.
meanings.example_zh: 门打开后，露出了一个美丽的花园。

meanings.example: We ran out of food.
meanings.example_zh: 我们的食物用完了。

meanings.example: Don't mix up the files.
meanings.example_zh: 不要把文件弄乱了。

meanings.example: We should put this information to good use.
meanings.example_zh: 我们应该有效利用这些信息。

meanings.example: He went through the documents carefully.
meanings.example_zh: 他仔细查看了文件。

meanings.example: What happened to you?
meanings.example_zh: 你发生了什么事？

meanings.example: Keep this in mind.
meanings.example_zh: 记住这一点。

meanings.example: In her case, it's different.
meanings.example_zh: 就她的情况而言，这是不同的。

meanings.example: To start with, we need to gather all the necessary materials.
meanings.example_zh: 首先，我们需要收集所有必要的材料。

meanings.example: The old shoes are worn out.
meanings.example_zh: 这双旧鞋已经磨损了。

meanings.example: Divide the class into groups.
meanings.example_zh: 把班级分成小组。

meanings.example: There is no one-size-fits-all solution to this problem.
meanings.example_zh: 这个问题没有通用的解决方案。

meanings.example: The high-speed train can travel at 300 km/h.
meanings.example_zh: 高速列车可以以每小时300公里的速度行驶。

meanings.example: People all over the world love this song.
meanings.example_zh: 全世界的人都喜欢这首歌。

word: be supposed to do / be sth

meanings.example: You are supposed to be here on time.
meanings.example_zh: 你应该准时到这里。

meanings.example: She is responsible for the success of the event.
meanings.example_zh: 她对活动的成功负责。

meanings.example: We will discuss this issue later on.
meanings.example_zh: 我们稍后会讨论这个问题。

meanings.example: The car began to speed up.
meanings.example_zh: 汽车开始加速。

meanings.example: Hard work results in success.
meanings.example_zh: 努力工作导致成功。

meanings.example: This action could lead to serious consequences.
meanings.example_zh: 这个行动可能导致严重的后果。

meanings.meaning: 试图找到做某事的方法
meanings.example: He is looking to improve his skills.
meanings.example_zh: 他正在寻找提高技能的方法。

meanings.example: The Tanggula Pass is a high mountain pass.
meanings.example_zh: 唐古拉山口是一个高山口。

meanings.example: He fell asleep while reading a book.
meanings.example_zh: 他在看书时睡着了。

meanings.example: Every human being has rights.
meanings.example_zh: 每个人都有权利。

meanings.example: Take an umbrella in case it rains.
meanings.example_zh: 带把伞以防下雨。

meanings.example: There were 200 passengers on board.
meanings.example_zh: 船上有200名乘客。

meanings.example: We need to cooperate with the team.
meanings.example_zh: 我们需要与团队合作。

meanings.example: They set foot on the moon.
meanings.example_zh: 他们登上了月球。

meanings.example: We sang along to the music.
meanings.example_zh: 我们随着音乐唱歌。

meanings.example: She danced to the music.
meanings.example_zh: 她随着音乐跳舞。

meanings.example: Hats off to the winner!
meanings.example_zh: 向获胜者表示敬佩！

meanings.example: Don't look down on others.
meanings.example_zh: 不要轻视别人。

meanings.example: The park is popular among young and old.
meanings.example_zh: 公园受到老老少少的欢迎。

meanings.example: He won the game fair and square.
meanings.example_zh: 他光明正大地赢得了比赛。

meanings.example: He tapped his feet to the rhythm.
meanings.example_zh: 他随着节奏用脚打节拍。

meanings.example: She took the lead in organizing the event.
meanings.example_zh: 她在组织活动时带头。

meanings.meaning: 逼近正在向前的人或物
meanings.example: He made up ground on the leader.
meanings.example_zh: 他逼近了领先者。

meanings.example: She caught up with her friend.
meanings.example_zh: 她追上了她的朋友。

meanings.example: She practices figure skating every day.
meanings.example_zh: 她每天练习花样滑冰。

meanings.example: Neither he nor she likes it.
meanings.example_zh: 他和她都不喜欢它。

meanings.example: He tried out for the team.
meanings.example_zh: 他参加了球队的选拔。

meanings.example: She looked at the stars in wonder.
meanings.example_zh: 她惊奇地看着星星。

meanings.example: He set a record in the 100-meter dash.
meanings.example_zh: 他在100米短跑中创造了纪录。

meanings.example: China has made great progress since the reform and opening-up.
meanings.example_zh: 自从改革开放以来，中国取得了巨大进步。

meanings.meaning: 最好（或最有意思）的部分
meanings.example: The high point of the trip was visiting the ancient ruins.
meanings.example_zh: 这次旅行的最精彩部分是参观古代遗址。

meanings.example: Bing Dwen Dwen is the mascot of the Winter Olympics.
meanings.example_zh: 冰墩墩是冬奥会的吉祥物。

meanings.example: Usain Bolt is a famous sprinter.
meanings.example_zh: 尤塞恩·博尔特是一位著名的短跑运动员。

meanings.example: Eric Moussambani is a famous swimmer.
meanings.example_zh: 埃里克·穆桑巴尼是一位著名的游泳运动员。

meanings.example: Equatorial Guinea is a country in Africa.
meanings.example_zh: 赤道几内亚是非洲的一个国家。
